questions.question: The ratio of the area of an ellipse x²/a² + y²/b² = 1 to the area of its auxiliary circle is ______.
The area bounded by y = x⁴ and its tangent at (1,1) is ______.
The power of a point P(x₁, y₁) with respect to circle S = 0 is ______.
Intercept made by the circle x² + y² + 2gx + 2fy + c = 0 on x-axis is ______.
The equation of circle passing through (1,0),(0,1) and having smallest radius is?
If the circle x² + y² + 2gx + 2fy + c = 0 touches the y-axis, then ______.
The equation x² + y² + 2gx + 2fy + c = 0 represents a point circle if ______.
The length of the tangent from (1, 1) to the circle x² + y² + 4x + 4y - 1 = 0 is ______.
If (1, 2) is one end of a diameter of the circle x² + y² + 2x - 4y = 0, the other end is ______.
Equation of director circle for x² + y² = a² is ______.
If two circles are orthogonal, the square of distance between centers is ______.
The pole of the line 3x+4y=45 with respect to circle x²+y²=25 is?
If the lines 2x + 3y + 1 = 0 and 3x - y - 4 = 0 are diameters of a circle of area 154 sq units, then its equation is ______.
The length of the common chord of the circles x² + y² + 2x + 3y + 1 = 0 and x² + y² + 4x + 3y + 2 = 0 is ______.
The center and radius of circle 2x²+2y²−x=0 is?
The radical axis of circles x²+y²+2x=0 and x²+y²−2y=0 is?
If the power of the point (1, 2) with respect to the circle x² + y² - 4x - 6y + k = 0 is 10, then k is ______.
Find the circle passing through origin belonging to coaxal system with limiting points (1, 2) and (4, 3).
Tangents drawn from origin to x²+y²−4x−4y+7=0 touch the circle at A,B. Area of △OAB = ?
If a circle passes through point (a, b) and cuts x² + y² = k² orthogonally, its center locus is ______.
The number of real common tangents to the circles x² + y² = 4 and x² + y² - 6x - 8y + 24 = 0 is ______.
If (0, 0) is the radical center of three circles, one being x² + y² + 2gx + 2fy + c = 0, then effectively ______.

options.A: c must be equal for all

questions.question: If arg((z - a) / (z - b)) = π/2, the locus of z is a ______.
If |z-3+2i| = 4, the locus of z is a circle with center ______.
The locus of z satisfying |z-i| + |z+i| = 4 is represented by the equation ______.
If α = π/2, the locus arg(z - z₁) / (z - z₂) is a ______.
Orthogonal trajectories of concentric circles x²+y²=C² are ______.
Degree of differential equation for ellipses with center at origin is ______.
Condition for y = mx + c to be tangent to x²/a² + y²/b² = 1 is ______.
Tangent to ellipse x²/a² + y²/b² = 1 at (x₁,y₁) is ______.
Tangent at ends of latus rectum of x²/a² + y²/b² = 1 meet at ______.
The angle between tangents from external point to ellipse depends on ______.
If angle between minor axis and focal radius is 30°, then e = ______.
Tangent at P(x₁,y₁) divides auxiliary circle in ratio ______.
The number of tangents from external point to ellipse is?
Advanced Ellipse property question 7 involving tangent properties and focal distances.
Advanced Ellipse property question 8 involving tangent properties and focal distances.
Tangent to x²/a² - y²/b² = 1 at (x₁,y₁) is ______.
If normals at four points on hyperbola are concurrent, they are called ______.
Product of lengths of perpendiculars from foci on any tangent of x²/a² - y²/b² = 1 is ______.
Condition for lx + my + n = 0 to be tangent is ______.
Normal to xy = c² at (ct, c/t) meets the curve again at point with parameter ______.
Number of tangents that can be drawn from (0,0) to standard hyperbola is ______.
The auxiliary circle of x²/a²−y²/b²=1 has equation?
The locus of a point such that the absolute difference of its distances from two fixed points is constant (less than distance between points) is a ______.
A stick of length L slides with its ends on two mutually perpendicular lines. The locus of its midpoint is a ______.
Locus of point equidistant from (2,3) and (4,1) is?
Locus of point P such that PA² + PB² = constant, for fixed points A and B, is a ______.
A variable line passes through (1,2). Locus of foot of perpendicular from origin to this line is?
Locus of point P such that PA² + PB² = 2c², where A=(−a,0) and B=(a,0) is?
Locus of intersection of mutually perpendicular tangents to a parabola is the ______.
The locus of points from which the angle subtended by a given line segment is 90° is a ______.
Locus of point P such that it form a triangle of area A with (0,0) and (x1,y1).
The locus of point from which tangents to y²=4ax are perpendicular is?
The locus of point such that the two tangents drawn to circle x²+y²=a² are perpendicular is?
The locus of a point which moves such that the square of its distance from the origin is equal to its distance from the line y = 2 is ______.
Find the locus of a point which is equidistant from (1,3) and the x-axis.
Locus of centroid of triangle with vertices (cosθ, sinθ), (sinθ, −cosθ) and (1,2) as θ varies is?

options.A: a circle with centre (1/3, 2/3) and radius 1/3

questions.question: Locus of intersection of tangent at P and normal at Q on y²=4ax where PQ is a focal chord is?

Find the maximum area of rectangle inscribed in circle of radius R.
If normals at P(t₁) and Q(t₂) meet at R(t₃) on y²=4ax, then t₁ + t₂ = ______.
The sum of the slopes of tangents from a point to y² = 4ax satisfies the condition m₁ + m₂ = ______.
Tangents at the ends of a focal chord are ______ to each other.
The length of the sub-tangent at any point on y²=4ax equals ______.
If tangent y=mx+a/m is drawn to y²=4ax, the point of tangency has x-coordinate ______.
For y² = 4ax, the locus of the point of intersection of perpendicular tangents is the ______.
Slope of normal to y²=4ax at (at², 2at) is ______.
Length of normal chord which subtends right angle at vertex is ______.
The locus of feet of perpendiculars from focus to any tangent is ______.
Tangent and normal at ends of latus rectum of y²=4ax meet at?
Number of ways of arranging 5 people in a circle is ______.
A plane is parallel to vectors i+j and j+k. Normal is proportional to ______.
The locus of points equidistant from the planes x + 2y + 2z = 3 and 2x - y + 2z = 5 is ______.
The circumradius of equilateral triangle with side a is?
Orthocenter, Centroid, Circumcenter are collinear on Euler Line.
The circumradius R of a triangle with area Δ and sides a, b, c is ______.
In ΔABC, r₁ (ex-radius opposite to vertex A) is ______.
Circumradius of triangle with vertices (0,0), (6,0), (0,8) is ______.
The centroid G divides the line joining orthocenter H and circumcenter S in ratio ______.
The orthocenter of the triangle formed by the lines x - 2y + 9 = 0, x + y - 9 = 0 and 2x - y - 9 = 0 is ______.
If two circles touch each other (internally or externally), the radical axis is the ______ at the point of contact.
Two circles x²+y²+2g₁x+c₁=0 and x²+y²+2g₂x+c₂=0 cut orthogonally when?
The limiting points of a coaxial system are circles of the system having ______ radius.
The radical axis of two circles is the locus of points from which tangent lengths to both circles are?
If the length of tangent from (0,0) to all circles of a coaxial system is the same, then the origin is a ______ of the system.
A circle passing through the limiting points of a coaxial system cuts every circle of the system ______.
If two circles are S = x² + y² - r₁² = 0 and S' = (x-a)² + y² - r₂² = 0, their radical axis is x = ______.
Length of Transverse Common Tangent (internal) is ______.
If three circles intersect each other, their three common chords are ______.

options.A: Concurrent (intersect at one point, the Radical Center)

questions.question: Circle x²+y²+4x+2y+c=0 bisects circumference of x²+y²−2x−4y−4=0. Then c = ?

The radical axis of two circles S and S' passes through their points of intersection if they ______.
Distance of the radical center from any of the three circles along a tangent is ______.
The normal to y = x² at (2,4) has slope?
If sub-tangent is constant, the curve is exponential.
If tangent to √x + √y = √a at (x1, y1) makes intercepts p, q, then p+q = a.
Length of normal is |y√(1+m²)|.
The slope of tangent to y = x³ − 3x at x = 2 is?
